_comment: Main_7_train_evaluate_PINN_full_profile.ipynb — PINNPFR with PFR ODE residuals. Keys consumed: top-level test_size/random_state; neural_network.* (same architecture as Main_6, self-contained here); pinn.loss_weights.*; pinn.training.*. See docs/ML_CONFIG_GUIDE.md.
_processed_stem_comment: Pins data/processed/features_targets_training_data_complete_<stem>.pkl (course default: the sample150 release dataset). Set to null for the newest features_targets_*.pkl.
_full_profile_max_rows_comment: 60000 covers the whole sample150 course dataset; research-scale value was null (no cap).

neural_network._comment: h1-h3: hidden layer widths. Omitted keys use notebook fallbacks. Course defaults are sized for free Colab (epochs=150, n_trials=8, n_colloc_per_batch=128); research-scale values were epochs=400, n_trials=15, n_colloc_per_batch=256.

tuning._comment: Optuna (Section 6b) when IF_HYPERPARAM_TUNING=True (off by default). Each trial trains on the data loss only (no physics/collocation terms) for epochs_per_trial epochs, so this is a proxy search over architecture/optimiser hyperparameters, not the physics loss weights.

pinn._comment: Inherits neural_network.* above for architecture. loss_weights controls per-term scaling (sweep these via Optuna); training controls curriculum schedule and collocation budget.

loss_weights._comment: Per-term multipliers for the composite loss: total = lambda_data*MSE + lambda_phys*(weighted sum of residuals). Sweep these to balance data fit vs constraint enforcement.

training._comment: Curriculum and collocation settings. curriculum_warmup_epochs: data-only phase before physics loss is switched on. n_colloc_per_batch: unlabelled z/L collocation points per training step. phys_loss_freq: apply physics loss every N steps (1 = every step).
